title: rubus × asperiflorus
intro: Rubus × asperiflorus, also known as the thimbleberry hybrid, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus laciniatus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × asperiflorus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × asperiflorus include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. Rubus × asperiflorus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its berries can be eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves.
